# Phase 01 Notes

## Goal

Anchor the project on the decisive finite-c modular-bootstrap papers and state what later numerical work must beat or reproduce.

## Current outcome

- Benchmark chain identified from 2013 to 2026.
- Scoping contract written and validated.
- Command-backed results registry initialized.

## Next command

Run `gpd init plan-phase 1` and then `gpd discuss-phase 01` if a deeper planning pass is desired.
